title: Recommendations for Digital Signature Solutions Integrated with Monday.com
excerpt:
Could you please recommend a digital signature solution that integrates with Monday.com, other than DocuSign and OpSign (which has been discontinued)? 
Thank you.

posts.author: EuniceNM (Eunice )
posts.cookedHtml:
Could you please recommend a digital signature solution that integrates with Monday.com, other than DocuSign and OpSign (which has been discontinued)?

Thank you.

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @EuniceNM,

There are 2 alternatives:

1. HelloSign (now know as Dropbox Sign) - this will allow you to send, sign and track documents directly from Monday.com workspace.
2. PandaDoc - this also allows to create, send and manage digital signatures within project management workflow.

However if you face any difficulty in the integration of these tools, reach out to our experienced monday.com consulting services provider for better approach.

posts.author: noasegal (Noa Segal)
posts.cookedHtml: Are these apps able to send over data from the docs signed into monday.com?

posts.author: Ishika (Ishika )
posts.cookedHtml: You can try Bolosign, as it integrates with monday.com smoothly. You can find it on Monday Marketplace.
